title: Explicit GIF ID reserve/reset semantics
description:
Feature: Explicit GIF ID reserve/reset semantics
Scenario: PicID lifecycle is observable
Given a connected Pixoo client
When get_http_gif_id and reset_http_gif_id are called
Then the corresponding device commands are sent and return values are exposed

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented explicit get/reset GIF ID methods with observable command behavior.
